requirement_topic.en: SLSB Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers — Import and Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: SLSB电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围——进口与型式认可
requirement_topic.zht: SLSB電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍——進口與型式認可

summary.en: The Sierra Leone Standards Bureau (SLSB), established under the Standards Act 2019 (Cap 283), is the national body responsible for standards development, metrology, and conformity assessment in Sierra Leone. SLSB is an affiliate member of IEC and adopts IEC publications as national standards. SLSB administers product conformity programmes for imported goods; electrical products imported into Sierra Leone are subject to SLSB conformity requirements, which may include pre-shipment inspection, product testing against applicable IEC or adopted national standards, and type approval. As of 2026-06-14, a specific SLSB mandatory certification scheme for EV chargers (EVSE) as a defined product category could not be confirmed from an official SLSB publication. However, any electrical equipment import is subject to general SLSB electrical product conformity requirements; importers and exporters should contact SLSB directly to confirm the applicable conformity route, HS code treatment, and any mandatory mark or certificate required for EV chargers before shipment.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂标准局（SLSB）依据《2019年标准法》（Cap 283）设立，是负责塞拉利昂标准制定、计量和合格评定的国家机构。SLSB是IEC联系成员，将IEC出版物作为国家标准采用。SLSB对进口商品实施产品合格评定计划；进口至塞拉利昂的电气产品须符合SLSB合格评定要求，可能包括装运前检验、依据适用IEC或采用的国家标准进行产品测试，以及型式认可。截至2026年6月14日，未能从SLSB官方出版物中确认针对电动汽车充电桩（EVSE）作为特定产品类别的强制认证方案。但任何电气设备进口均须符合SLSB通用电气产品合格评定要求；进口商和出口商在出货前应直接联系SLSB，确认适用的合格评定路径、HS编码处理方式，以及电动汽车充电桩所需的任何强制标志或证书。
summary.zht: 獅子山標準局（SLSB）依據《2019年標準法》（Cap 283）設立，是負責獅子山標準制定、計量和合格評定的國家機構。SLSB是IEC聯繫成員，將IEC出版物作為國家標準採用。SLSB對進口商品實施產品合格評定計劃；進口至獅子山的電氣產品須符合SLSB合格評定要求，可能包括裝運前檢驗、依據適用IEC或採用的國家標準進行產品測試，以及型式認可。截至2026年6月14日，未能從SLSB官方出版物中確認針對電動汽車充電樁（EVSE）作為特定產品類別的強制認證方案。但任何電氣設備進口均須符合SLSB通用電氣產品合格評定要求；進口商和出口商在出貨前應直接聯繫SLSB，確認適用的合格評定路徑、HS編碼處理方式，以及電動汽車充電樁所需的任何強制標誌或證書。

standards_or_laws: Sierra Leone Standards Act 2019 (Cap 283) — establishes SLSB and its conformity assessment mandate
SLSB product conformity programme for imported electrical goods
IEC publications adopted as Sierra Leone national standards via SLSB
EWRC (Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission) — licensing and approval for electrical service providers
Sierra Leone Customs and Excise Department — HS code classification for EV chargers

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may be submitted as part of an engineering review to support SLSB conformity assessment but does not by itself satisfy SLSB conformity requirements, IEC 61851 test evidence obligations, or EWRC installation approval requirements.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可作为工程审查的一部分提交支持SLSB合格评定，但其本身无法满足SLSB合格评定要求、IEC 61851测试证据义务或EWRC安装审批要求。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可作為工程審查的一部分提交支持SLSB合格評定，但其本身無法滿足SLSB合格評定要求、IEC 61851測試證據義務或EWRC安裝審批要求。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should: (1) contact SLSB to confirm the mandatory conformity route, applicable IEC standard versions, and required certificate or mark for EV chargers before shipment; (2) confirm HS code classification with Sierra Leone Customs for the specific charger type and rated power; (3) obtain IEC 61851-1 and IEC 62196 test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory to support SLSB conformity assessment; (4) ensure product labelling is in English (Sierra Leone's official language) and includes rated voltage, frequency, power, IP rating, manufacturer name and address, and relevant standard references; (5) coordinate with EWRC for any licensing requirements applicable to EV charging service operators; (6) verify with EDSA for grid-connection acceptance requirements for the specific installation site. The absence of a confirmed specific SLSB EV charger certification scheme as of 2026-06-14 means exporters should not assume absence of requirement equals absence of obligation — contact SLSB directly.
gap.zh: 出口商应：(1) 在出货前联系SLSB确认电动汽车充电桩的强制合格评定路径、适用IEC标准版本及所需证书或标志；(2) 向塞拉利昂海关确认具体充电桩类型和额定功率的HS编码分类；(3) 从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 61851-1和IEC 62196测试报告以支持SLSB合格评定；(4) 确保产品标签采用英文（塞拉利昂官方语言），并包含额定电压、频率、功率、IP防护等级、制造商名称及地址，以及相关标准引用；(5) 与EWRC协调电动汽车充电服务运营商适用的任何许可证要求；(6) 向EDSA核实具体安装场地的并网接入要求。截至2026年6月14日，尚未确认特定的SLSB电动汽车充电桩认证方案，出口商不应将此视为无要求等同于无义务——应直接联系SLSB。
gap.zht: 出口商應：(1) 在出貨前聯繫SLSB確認電動汽車充電樁的強制合格評定路徑、適用IEC標準版本及所需證書或標誌；(2) 向獅子山海關確認具體充電樁類型和額定功率的HS編碼分類；(3) 從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 61851-1和IEC 62196測試報告以支持SLSB合格評定；(4) 確保產品標籤採用英文（獅子山官方語言），並包含額定電壓、頻率、功率、IP防護等級、製造商名稱及地址，以及相關標準引用；(5) 與EWRC協調電動汽車充電服務運營商適用的任何許可證要求；(6) 向EDSA核實具體安裝場地的併網接入要求。截至2026年6月14日，尚未確認特定的SLSB電動汽車充電樁認證方案，出口商不應將此視為無要求等同於無義務——應直接聯繫SLSB。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — SLSB conformity applies to imported electrical products; specific EV charger mandatory certification route could not be confirmed from an official SLSB publication as of 2026-06-14; EWRC licensing applies to electricity service providers; EDSA connection approval is mandatory for grid-connected installations; exporters must verify the current position with SLSB, EWRC, and EDSA before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence alone is not a SLSB conformity substitute and does not satisfy IEC-based evidence requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Sierra Leone market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Contact SLSB to confirm the EV charger conformity route and required certificates. Prepare IEC 61851-1 and IEC 62196 accredited test reports, English-language labelling, and coordinate EWRC licensing and EDSA connection approval separately. As of 2026-06-14, the Sierra Leone EV market is essentially non-existent at the four-wheeler level; assess market readiness before committing resources.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足塞拉利昂市场准入。联系SLSB确认电动汽车充电桩合格评定路径和所需证书。准备IEC 61851-1和IEC 62196认可测试报告、英文标签，并分别协调EWRC许可证和EDSA接入许可。截至2026年6月14日，塞拉利昂四轮电动汽车市场基本不存在；在投入资源前应评估市场成熟度。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足獅子山市場准入。聯繫SLSB確認電動汽車充電樁合格評定路徑和所需證書。準備IEC 61851-1和IEC 62196認可測試報告、英文標籤，並分別協調EWRC許可證和EDSA接入許可。截至2026年6月14日，獅子山四輪電動汽車市場基本不存在；在投入資源前應評估市場成熟度。

requirement_topic.en: Sierra Leone EV Market Context — Nascent Market, Grid Deficits, and 2/3-Wheeler Priority
requirement_topic.zh: 塞拉利昂电动汽车市场背景——初期市场、电网缺口与两/三轮车优先
requirement_topic.zht: 獅子山電動汽車市場背景——初期市場、電網缺口與兩/三輪車優先

summary.en: Sierra Leone is among the world's least-electrified countries: approximately 26% of the population has access to electricity (2023 World Bank/IEA estimate), concentrated in Freetown, with rural electrification substantially lower. EDSA's generation capacity is approximately 100–130 MW against estimated demand of 200+ MW, resulting in chronic load-shedding. This fundamental grid deficit means that deploying conventional AC grid-tied EV chargers at scale is not currently viable. The four-wheel EV fleet in Sierra Leone is essentially non-existent as of 2026-06-14. The most commercially relevant near-term EV segment is electric two- and three-wheelers (e-mopeds, e-motorcycles, e-tricycles / tuk-tuks), which are lower cost, lower power consumption, and can be charged from lower-power AC sockets or small solar systems without requiring purpose-built EVSE infrastructure. Several donor-funded and NGO-led initiatives have explored EV introduction in Sierra Leone, primarily focusing on 2/3-wheelers and off-grid solar charging. Any China exporter targeting Sierra Leone for EV charging equipment should honestly assess: (a) whether there is a viable vehicle fleet to serve, (b) whether the grid or solar infrastructure can reliably power the charger, and (c) whether there is a credible project owner, operator, or donor agency driving deployment.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂是全球电气化程度最低的国家之一：约26%的人口可以用电（2023年世界银行/IEA估计），主要集中在弗里敦，农村电气化率更低。EDSA发电能力约为100–130 MW，而估计需求超过200 MW，导致长期限电。这一根本性的电网缺口意味着大规模部署常规交流电网供电的电动汽车充电桩目前并不可行。截至2026年6月14日，塞拉利昂四轮电动汽车保有量基本为零。近期最具商业相关性的电动汽车细分市场是电动两轮和三轮车（电动摩托车、电动摩托、电动三轮车/突突车），其成本较低，功耗较小，可通过低功率交流插座或小型太阳能系统充电，无需专用的EVSE基础设施。多个捐助方资助和非政府组织主导的倡议已在塞拉利昂探索电动汽车引入，主要聚焦于两轮/三轮车和离网太阳能充电。任何针对塞拉利昂电动汽车充电设备的中国出口商应客观评估：(a) 是否存在可服务的可行车辆群；(b) 电网或太阳能基础设施是否能可靠为充电桩供电；以及(c) 是否有可信的项目业主、运营商或捐助机构推动部署。
summary.zht: 獅子山是全球電氣化程度最低的國家之一：約26%的人口可以用電（2023年世界銀行/IEA估計），主要集中在弗里敦，農村電氣化率更低。EDSA發電能力約為100–130 MW，而估計需求超過200 MW，導致長期限電。這一根本性的電網缺口意味著大規模部署常規交流電網供電的電動汽車充電樁目前並不可行。截至2026年6月14日，獅子山四輪電動汽車保有量基本為零。近期最具商業相關性的電動汽車細分市場是電動兩輪和三輪車（電動摩托車、電動摩托、電動三輪車/突突車），其成本較低，功耗較小，可通過低功率交流插座或小型太陽能系統充電，無需專用的EVSE基礎設施。多個捐助方資助和非政府組織主導的倡議已在獅子山探索電動汽車引入，主要聚焦於兩輪/三輪車和離網太陽能充電。任何針對獅子山電動汽車充電設備的中國出口商應客觀評估：(a) 是否存在可服務的可行車輛群；(b) 電網或太陽能基礎設施是否能可靠為充電樁供電；以及(c) 是否有可信的項目業主、運營商或捐助機構推動部署。

standards_or_laws: Sierra Leone Electricity Act 2011 — governance framework for electricity services
World Bank / IEA — Sierra Leone electricity access and generation data (2023)
EDSA (Electricity Distribution and Supply Authority) — national utility, generation capacity data
EWRC (Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission) — regulator for energy sector
UN SDG7 — Affordable and Clean Energy; Sierra Leone SDG7 progress tracking

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion operates in a high-electrification, high-grid-reliability environment with a massive domestic EV vehicle fleet. China's domestic EV and charging market scale does not translate into automatic readiness for frontier markets like Sierra Leone, where grid, vehicle fleet, and regulatory infrastructure prerequisites are largely absent. Chinese manufacturers targeting Sierra Leone should consider: solar-hybrid or off-grid battery-buffer charger designs; 2/3-wheeler charging solutions (lower power, simpler infrastructure); and project-finance or donor-agency-led deployment channels rather than direct commercial sales.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张运行于高电气化、高电网可靠性环境中，并拥有庞大的国内电动汽车保有量。中国国内电动汽车和充电市场规模无法自动转化为在塞拉利昂等前沿市场的就绪状态——在那里，电网、车辆保有量和监管基础设施前提条件基本缺失。针对塞拉利昂的中国制造商应考虑：太阳能混合或离网储能充电桩设计；两轮/三轮车充电解决方案（功耗较低，基础设施更简单）；以及项目融资或捐助机构主导的部署渠道，而非直接商业销售。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張運行於高電氣化、高電網可靠性環境中，並擁有龐大的國內電動汽車保有量。中國國內電動汽車和充電市場規模無法自動轉化為在獅子山等前沿市場的就緒狀態——在那裡，電網、車輛保有量和監管基礎設施前提條件基本缺失。針對獅子山的中國製造商應考慮：太陽能混合或離網儲能充電樁設計；兩輪/三輪車充電解決方案（功耗較低，基礎設施更簡單）；以及項目融資或捐助機構主導的部署渠道，而非直接商業銷售。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China) — domestic context only
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements — domestic context only

gap.en: Sierra Leone's market context creates a fundamental readiness gap that precedes any technical standards gap: (1) no established four-wheel EV vehicle fleet means no demand for standard EVSE; (2) chronic grid deficits mean conventional grid-tied chargers will frequently be inoperable; (3) no existing EVSE regulatory framework has been formally published by SLSB or EWRC as of 2026-06-14; (4) most viable near-term demand is for 2/3-wheeler charging, not four-wheel EVSE. Exporters should: confirm the existence of a specific vehicle fleet and deployment project before product development; design for solar-hybrid or battery-backup power; target donor-funded or NGO-led pilots as the most credible near-term channel; and engage SLSB and EWRC early in the project cycle, not at the point of shipment.
gap.zh: 塞拉利昂的市场背景产生了一个先于任何技术标准差距的根本性就绪差距：(1) 尚无四轮电动汽车保有量，意味着对标准EVSE没有需求；(2) 长期电网缺口导致常规并网充电桩将频繁无法运行；(3) 截至2026年6月14日，SLSB或EWRC尚未正式发布任何EVSE监管框架；(4) 近期最可行的需求主要是两轮/三轮车充电，而非四轮EVSE。出口商应：在产品开发前确认是否存在特定车辆群和部署项目；设计具备太阳能混合或储能备用电源；将捐助方资助或非政府组织主导的试点项目作为近期最可信的渠道；并在项目周期早期（而非出货时）就与SLSB和EWRC接触。
gap.zht: 獅子山的市場背景產生了一個先於任何技術標準差距的根本性就緒差距：(1) 尚無四輪電動汽車保有量，意味著對標準EVSE沒有需求；(2) 長期電網缺口導致常規併網充電樁將頻繁無法運行；(3) 截至2026年6月14日，SLSB或EWRC尚未正式發布任何EVSE監管框架；(4) 近期最可行的需求主要是兩輪/三輪車充電，而非四輪EVSE。出口商應：在產品開發前確認是否存在特定車輛群和部署項目；設計具備太陽能混合或儲能備用電源；將捐助方資助或非政府組織主導的試點項目作為近期最可信的渠道；並在項目週期早期（而非出貨時）就與SLSB和EWRC接觸。

mandatory_status.target: Market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; fundamental market readiness conditions (grid reliability, vehicle fleet, regulatory framework) must be assessed before technical compliance obligations become relevant
mandatory_status.cn: Market context only — China EV market scale does not affect Sierra Leone market readiness or conformity obligations

source.publisher: World Bank / ESMAP — Tracking SDG7: The Energy Progress Report

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sierra Leone is a long-horizon frontier market for EV charging. No four-wheel EV fleet exists; EDSA grid deficits make grid-only charger deployment impractical today. Most viable near-term opportunity is 2/3-wheeler solar-hybrid charging, not standard EVSE. Treat this as a project-by-project opportunity requiring early SLSB and EWRC engagement, not a standard commercial export channel.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞拉利昂是电动汽车充电领域的长期潜力前沿市场。目前不存在四轮电动汽车保有量；EDSA电网缺口使仅依赖电网的充电桩部署今天不切实际。近期最可行的机会是两轮/三轮车太阳能混合充电，而非标准EVSE。应将其视为逐项目运作的机会，需要提前与SLSB和EWRC接触，而非标准商业出口渠道。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 獅子山是電動汽車充電領域的長期潛力前沿市場。目前不存在四輪電動汽車保有量；EDSA電網缺口使僅依賴電網的充電樁部署今天不切實際。近期最可行的機會是兩輪/三輪車太陽能混合充電，而非標準EVSE。應將其視為逐項目運作的機會，需要提前與SLSB和EWRC接觸，而非標準商業出口渠道。
